acceptance_targets: [chapter_17_F01] PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:339 removes numbered policy recital and includes (1) one on-page disagreement that changes a boundary term, and (2) one immediate consequence rendered in scene (speech/action/sensory detail) by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:351. FAIL if the ending still resolves through abstract wrap-up language alone.

[chapter_17_F02] PASS if revised sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:329 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:343 shows one concrete, time-bound recovery action on-page (for example: live call with sponsor, entering a meeting room, or physically interrupting access to alcohol) with sensory friction and a plausible failure point before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:353. FAIL if sobriety management remains only in declarative report text.

[chapter_17_F05] PASS if revised opening anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:23 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:39 has only one documentary-inventory pass before confirmation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:53, and revised negotiation after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173 adds at least one new contested fact or leverage shift by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247. FAIL if multiple inventory summaries remain and negotiation proceeds without new resistance.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:339 removes numbered policy recital and includes (1) one on-page disagreement that changes a boundary term, and (2) one immediate consequence rendered in scene (speech/action/sensory detail) by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:351. FAIL if the ending still resolves through abstract wrap-up language alone.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift in the final third: the chapter moves from volatile mother-daughter consequence into procedural recitation (numbered terms, legal-email workflow, abstract moral wrap-up). That summary-and-policy mode functions as a safety valve that defuses narrative danger right after the paternity/overdose disclosures.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:253, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:339, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:351, replace policy-list exposition with contested scene action. Keep the boundary decision, but make at least one term actively fought over on-page, then show one immediate human cost of the chosen boundary (family, legal, sobriety, or relationship) before chapter close.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:329 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:343 shows one concrete, time-bound recovery action on-page (for example: live call with sponsor, entering a meeting room, or physically interrupting access to alcohol) with sensory friction and a plausible failure point before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:353. FAIL if sobriety management remains only in declarative report text.
findings.problem: Timidity: the craving threat is named but mostly handled by reported status updates and text logistics, so the prose retreats from the embodied risk the chapter itself establishes.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:329, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:343, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:353, add one step-by-step sobriety pressure beat (urge escalation plus counteraction) instead of only summarizing that she did not drink and might attend a meeting.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised opening anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:23 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:39 has only one documentary-inventory pass before confirmation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:53, and revised negotiation after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173 adds at least one new contested fact or leverage shift by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247. FAIL if multiple inventory summaries remain and negotiation proceeds without new resistance.
findings.problem: Dramatic economy leak: the chapter repeats documentary-inventory/explainer material in multiple passes, reducing uncertainty and leverage in a scene that should rely on revelation pressure rather than restated thesis.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress duplicate inventory beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:23 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:39, then repurpose space at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:173 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:247 for new resistance, withholding, or tactical reversal before agreement.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
